info.name: Meridian – Identity – Examples
info.description:
KYC/KYB identity verification and short-lived auth token issuance for the Meridian platform.

## Purpose

Examples collection — saved responses powering the Postman mock server and the CI Local Mocks.

## Consumers

- Dependent services (via Local Mocks in CI)
- External integrators exploring via the mock server

exec: // Generate fresh Idempotency-Key for mutating requests

query.description: Opaque cursor from previous page's next_cursor.

request.description:
List identities

### Auth

OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Scope: `read`.

### Notes

Correlation ID is auto-injected by the pre-request script.

response.name: Validation error 422
response.body:
{
  "type": "https://errors.meridianfs.example/validation",
  "title": "Validation failed",
  "status": 422,
  "detail": "The `amount_minor` field must be a positive integer.",
  "correlation_id": "cor_01HXYZABCDEFG"
}
